sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-07-27 13:44
- Distance: 17.9 km
- Moving time: 1:36:29
- Elapsed time: 1:36:36
- Elevation gain: 122 m
- Average heart rate: 169.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 181 bpm
- Average watts: 227.1 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `6` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.5 bpm`, ranging from `158.6` to `176.3 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.7 bpm` and second-half average HR was `174.3 bpm` (+7.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `178.7 spm`, with a working range of `173.6` to `181.3 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `179.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `177.9 spm` (-1.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:23 /km` across `17.896 km` in `1:36:29` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:13 /km` and second-half pace was `5:34 /km` (+21 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `169.6 bpm` average and `181 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `165.1 bpm` in the first half and `173.7 bpm` in the second (+8.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:36:29` out of `1:36:36` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `163.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.0 m` and `19.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `80.2 m` in the first half and `83.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
